name: @visuelconcept/wui-warehouse
description: Warehouse Management System — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page: configure storage zones and locations, a product catalog, visualise stock on a 2D plan + tables, and run stock-count inventory campaigns. Config/products/campaigns persist as JSON-in-DP (DpJsonStore); stock quantities live in a dedicated WMS_Stock datapoint type (archivable / alarmable).
